observations.anti_goal: GET /api/sessions/{id} (the list/open path) MUST NOT eagerly parse full per-iteration result.json/rating.json payloads; iteration detail is lazy-loaded via the existing per-iteration endpoint.
observations.note: RESOLVED — definitive verdict delivered by the iter-1 coherence-auditor and independently confirmed by the evaluator reading the route. get_session builds its iteration list from read_iteration_meta (lightweight per-iteration metadata) and lazy-loads each run's heavy result/rating/equity_curve/trades ONLY via GET /{session_id}/iterations/{iteration_id} (session_routes.py:144-184, explicit docstring). This CONFORMS to the anti-goal. The iter-0 ~245KB measurement, if still accurate, is dominated by per-iteration metadata + activity log across many runs (pre-existing), not by eager result/rating parsing. iter-1's only change to the route is the additive O(1) autoRun block (status string, ids, integer counters) — payload not worsened, lazy loading preserved. Do not re-litigate.

Backend unit suite: 164 passed, 1 deselected (key-gated live smoke), 1 failed. Sole failure tests/test_directions_cache.py::test_write_and_read_full_round_trip (timeframeResults round-trip) — the directions cache is goal Capability #10 (nice-to-have), not a Must-have journey nor an anti-goal invariant. Pre-existing on an untouched module; re-confirmed red on the iter-1 tree. Not a regression. Anti-goal invariants (test_lookahead, test_determinism, test_sandbox) all PASS (39 tests).
